# Proposal Handoff Template

At the end of every archaeology report, include a proposal handoff block.

```md
## Proposal Handoff

Recommended next command:
chaos:propose "<change intent>" --<mode>

Evidence to pass forward:
- Entry point: `<file-or-symbol>`
- Persistence concern: `<file-or-component>`
- Side effects: `<none|known|possible>`
- Tests: `<found|missing|partial>`
- Relevant ADRs/rules: `<ids>`

Suggested proposal constraints:
- <constraint 1>
- <constraint 2>

Open risks for proposal:
- <risk 1>
- <risk 2>

Recommended review focus:
- <focus area>
```

If the archaeology is not ready for proposal, recommend a narrower follow-up archaeology command instead.
